=Summer Festival=
[[File:Summer Festival.jpeg|500x500px|left]]
Found in the Events section, First Tab.<br>Sept. 01 - Sept. 15 2023<br>
'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=25
{{clear}}

==Pirate's Treasure==
[[File:Pirate's Treasure.png|500x500px|left]]
{|class= "wikitable
!Price
!Rewards
|-
|W-tads x6,000
|Rainbow Points x30<br>Lottery Ticket x10<br>Shell x50<br>[[The Argo]] Frag. x40
|-
|Any Purchase (Real Money)
|Swimsuit Pirate Avatar<br>Sell x30<br>W-tads x600
|-
|$49.99
|[[The Argo]] Frag. x40<br>[[Gear|Eye of Horus]]<br>Lottery Ticket x40<br>Rainbow Points x50<br>W-tads x4,000
|}
{{clear}}

==Summer Fireworks==
Set off fireworks to get random rewards! For every 20 fireworks, you get a precious reward!<br>
Regular Fireworks: 95% chance to trigger. Dazzling Fireworks: 5% to trigger.
{|class=wikitable
!colspan=3| Dazzling Fireworks
|-
|W-tads x1,000<br>50%
|Wish Coin x2<br>30%
|Incense<br>20%
|-
!colspan=3|Regular Fireworks
|-
|B-tads x6,000<br>20%
|Evolution Chest x20<br>16.47%
|Gear Chest x20<br>16.47%
|-
|Clone Speedup x1h<br>11.76%
|Gene Speedup x1h<br>11.76%
|Offering Speedup x1h<br>11.76%
|-
|Glue x10<br>5.88%
|Toner x10<br>5.88%
|}

===Precious Reward===
{| class="wikitable"
!No.
!Reward
|-
|1
|Incense
|-
|2
|[[Summer Album]]
|-
|3
|Grandmaster Scroll x40
|-
|4
|Relic RF x20
|-
|5
|Basketball (Minion Skin)
|}

===Firework Pack===
{|class=wikitable
!Price
!Rewards
|-
|W-tads x300
|Fireworks<br>(Available 20 times)
|-
|$4.99
|Fireworks x20<br>W-tads x300
|-
|$14.99
|Fireworks<br>W-tads x1,000
|}

==Deepsea Witch==
===Island Shop===
Use Island Coins to buy event props! The coins left will be converted into B-tads after the event.

Island Coin Source
*Join Seabed Treasure Hunting
*Claim Treasure Point Rewards
*Claim Rainbow Point Rewards

===Purchase Pack===
Summer Value Pack
{|class= "wikitable"
!Price
!Rewards
|-
|2,000 W-tads
|Lottery Ticket x8<br>Glue x50<br>Shell x20
|-
|3,000
|Wish Coin x3<br>Offering Speedup x15h<br>Shell x30
|-
|$4.99
|Swimsuit Chan-hee Avatar<br>Incense x1<br>Rainbow Points x10<br>W-tads x300
|-
|$14.99
|Dragon Ball x1<br>Offering Speedup x12h<br>Rainbow Points x20<br>W-tads x1,000
|-
|$29.99
|Gene Speedup x1d<br>Lottery Ticket x30<br>Rainbow Points x30<br>W-tads x2,000
|-
|$69.99
|Golden Pickaxe x18<br>Wish Coin x25<br>Rainbow Points x40<br>W-tads x5,000
|-
|$99.99
|Grandmaster Scroll x40<br>Lottery Tickets x60<br>Rainbow Points x50<br>W-tads x8,000
|}

==Seabed Treasure Hunting==

===Seabed Treasure Hunting Intro===
# Send a sea otter to hunt for treasures!
# Every treasure hunting costs 1 shell and earns you 1 Treasure Pt, which is for reward claiming.
# 13% chance of getting Sea Treasure for every hunting, after getting which you will enter the next area.
# After the event starts, you can claim 20 shells for free every day.

===Seabed Treasure Rewards===
Get B-tads for every non-Sea Treasure hunt, and all other rewards for Sea Treasure.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Area
!Rewards
|-
|1-9
|B-tads x1,000<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x50
|-
|10
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Rainbow Points x10
|-
|11-19
|B-tads x1,200<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x60
|-
|20
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Lottery Ticket x3
|-
|21-29
|B-tads x1,400<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x70
|-
|30
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Rainbow Points x10
|-
|31-39
|B-tads x1,600<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x80
|-
|40
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Wish Coin x2
|-
|41-49
|B-tads x1,800<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x90
|-
|50
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Rainbow Points x20
|-
|51-59
|B-tads x2,000<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x100
|-
|60
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Lottery Ticket x5
|-
|61-69
|B-tads x2,200<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x110
|-
|70
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Incense
|-
|71-79
|B-tads x2,400<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x120
|-
|80
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Wish Coin x3
|-
|81-89
|B-tads x2,600<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x130
|-
|90
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Lottery Ticket x8
|-
|91-99
|B-tads x2,800<br>Island Coin x200<br>W-tads x140
|-
|100
|Fireworks x2<br>Island Coin x300<br>Dragon Orb
|-
|101+
|B-tads x3,000<br>Gene Speed up x4h<br>W-tads x150
|}

===Treasure Hunter===
[[File:Treasure Hunter.jpeg|200x200px|left]]
Unlock after reaching Area 30.<br>
Obtain 10 pts for each area explored!<br>
Hunter is free, Master Hunter is $14.99
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!colspan="3" |Rewards
|-
!Points
!Hunter
!Master Hunter
|-
|60
|rowspan="3"| Summer Drink x1
|[[Pirate's Coin]], Lottery Ticket x5
|-
|80
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|100
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|120
|Expert Alchemy Case x2
|Mater Alchemy Case x3, Organ Chest x100
|-
|140
|rowspan="3"| Summer Drink x1
|Lottery Ticket x5
|-
|160
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|180
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|200
|Gene Speedup x4h
|Gene Speedup x12h, Organ Chest x100
|-
|230
|rowspan="3"| Summer Drink x1
|Lottery Tickets x5
|-
|260
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|290
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|320
|Offering Speedup x6h
|Dragon Orb, Organ Chest
|-
|350
|rowspan="3"| Summer Drink x1
|Lottery Ticket x5
|-
|380
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|410
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|440
|Purple Fungus Choice Pack
|Orange Fungus Choice Pack, Organ Chest x100
|-
|470
|rowspan="3"| Summer Drink x1
|Lottery Ticket x5
|-
|500
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|530
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|560
|Novice Scroll x10
|Master Scroll x40, Organ Chest x100
|-
|590
|rowspan="3"| Summer Drink x1
|Lottery Ticket 5
|-
|620
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|650
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|680
|Expert Scroll x20
|Relic RF x15, Organ Chest x100
|-
|740
|rowspan="2"| Summer Drink x1
|Wish Coin x2
|-
|770
|Offering Speedup x8h
|-
|800
|Incense
|Incense x2, Organ Chest x100
|}
{{clear}}

===Point reward===
====Treasure Point====
Get 1 Treasure Pt for each hunting!<br>
Get Offering Speedups and Lottery Tickets at every tier. Get Island Coins on certain tiers. Get Rainbow Points or W-tads on every third tier.

====Rainbow Points====
Purchase packs to get Rainbow Pts.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Points
!Rewards
|-
|10
|Offering Speedup x4h, Island Coin x600, Shell x10
|-
|20
|Offering Speedup x4h, Island Coin x600, Shell x10
|-
|30
|Offering Speedup x4h, Island Coin x600, Lottery Ticket x6
|-
|40
|Offering Speedup x4h, Island Coin x600, Shell x10
|-
|50
|Offering Speedup x4h, Island Coin x600, Shell x10
|-
|60
|Offering Speedup x4h, Island Coin x600, Wish Coin x3
|-
|70
|Offering Speedup x6h, Island Coin x800, Shell x12
|-
|80
|Offering Speedup x6h, Island Coin x800, Shell x12
|-
|90
|Offering Speedup x6h, Island Coin x800, Incense
|-
|100
|Offering Speedup x6h, Island Coin x800, Shell x12
|-
|115
|Offering Speedup x6h, Island Coin x800, Shell x12
|-
|130
|Offering Speedup x6h, Island Coin x800, [[Mermaid's Tears]]
|-
|145
|Offering Speedup x8h, Island Coin x1,200, Shell x14
|-
|160
|Offering Speedup x8h, Island Coin x1,200, Shell x14
|-
|180
|Offering Speedup x8h, Island Coin x1,200, [[The Argo]] Frags x40
|-
|200
|Offering Speedup x8h, Island Coin x1,200, Shell x14
|-
|220
|Offering Speedup x8h, Island Coin x1,200, Shell x14
|-
|240
|Offering Speedup x8h, Island Coin x1,200, [[Gear|Eye of Horus]]
|-
|270
|Offering Speedup x12h, Island Coin x1,600, Shell x16
|-
|300
|Offering Speedup x12h, Island Coin x1,600, Shell x16
|-
|330
|Offering Speedup x12h, Island Coin x1,600, [[The Argo]] Frags x40
|-
|360
|Offering Speedup x12h, Island Coin x1,600, Shell x16
|-
|400
|Offering Speedup x12h, Island Coin x1,600, Shell x16
|-
|440
|Offering Speedup x12h, Island Coin x1,600, Relic RF x60
|-
|480
|Offering Speedup x18h, Island Coin x2,200, Shell x18
|-
|520
|Offering Speedup x18h, Island Coin x2,200, Shell x18
|-
|560
|Offering Speedup x18h, Island Coin x2,200, [[The Argo]] Frags x40
|-
|600
|Offering Speedup x18h, Island Coin x2,200, Shell x18
|-
|640
|Offering Speedup x18h, Island Coin x2,200, Shell x18
|-
|680
|Offering Speedup x18h, Island Coin x2,200, [[Gear|Crystal of Will]]
|-
|720
|Offering Speedup x1d, Island Coin x3,000, Shell x20
|-
|760
|Offering Speedup x1d, Island Coin x3,000, Shell x20
|-
|800
|Offering Speedup x1d, Island Coin x3,000, [[The Argo]] Frags x40
|-
|850
|Offering Speedup x1d, Island Coin x3,000, Shell x20
|-
|900
|Offering Speedup x1d, Island Coin x3,000, Shell x20
|-
|950
|Offering Speedup x1d, Island Coin x3,000, Summer Holiday(Decoration)
|}

=Summer Fest=
Found by the Events Section, in the Palm Tree icon.

==Shaved Ice==
Enjoy Shaved Ice every day to get rewards!<br>
Summer Voucher x2, Summer Drinks

==Summer Gift==
# Consume 1 Summer Voucher to open the Gift Box once.
# Participate in the Shaved Ice event or claim Summer Fest Purchase bonus to earn Summer Vouchers.
# Gift Boxes will be refreshed after claiming all of the rewards.

[[File:Summer Gift 1.webp|500x500px]]
[[File:Summer Gift 2.jpeg|500x500px]]
{{clear}}

==Summer Fest Purchase Bonus==
Earn Master Alchemy Case x3, Summer Voucher x2 from every tier.

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|The Argo|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Mermaid's Tears|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Pirate's Coin|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Summer Album|green}}

[[Category:Events]]
